title: Converting Oracle data types to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert Oracle data types (VARCHAR2, NUMBER, DATE) to PostgreSQL equivalents while maintaining precision and internationalization. Gemini assists developers migrating applications to the cloud by converting database schemas and providing explanations of the conversion process.
